## 📄 Pull Request Description
A clear and concise description of the changes introduced by this Pull Request.
*What problem does this PR solve? Why was this approach chosen?*

## 🔗 Related Issues
Link any issues closed or addressed by this PR.
*Closes #<issue_number>* or *Fixes #<issue_number>*

## 🛠️ Type of Changes
Please tick the relevant options:
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (no code changes)
- [ ] 💅 UI/UX Polish / Style adjustments

## 🧪 Verification & Testing
Describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.
*What scenarios did you test? On what devices/browsers?*

### Test Checklist
- [ ] Tested locally on browser (Chrome / Firefox / Safari)
- [ ] Verified PDF generation is fully functional with ReportLab
- [ ] Played through the Autonomous Hunter flow and verified SSE logging streams
- [ ] Verified ATS scoring logic is correct

## ✅ Pre-merge Checklist
Before submitting this Pull Request, please verify:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project (TypeScript/PEP 8).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly if my changes add new parameters or env variables.
- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](CONTRIBUTING.md#git-workflow) convention.
